summary: Sparky now calls Claude API live. Falls back to deterministic stub on missing key, network error, or moderation block. Free-tier quota enforced (3 stories/month) via UsageEvent.

system_prompt_constraints: Output 1-2 short sentences. No questions. No bullets.
Reference at least one character by name

quota_guard.blocked_response_paragraph: You've made N stories this month — that's the free plan! Ask a grown-up about Premium for more stories.

telemetry: UsageEvent kind='story_started' on first beat (free tier counted)
UsageEvent kind='image_generated' on every beat with imagePrompt
deploys_via: cron auto-pull every 2 min (commit lands → /var/log/inklings-deploy.log shows pull → pm2 restart with new build)
live_at: https://inklings.shop/studio (after cron picks up the merge)
